title: Bosnia and Herzegovina (Republika Srpska) — Report of a Lost or Stolen Travel Document (Obrazac GPI-1)
description: The Ministry of Interior of Republika Srpska's (Ministarstvo unutrašnjih poslova Republike Srpske, MUP RS) Obrazac GPI-1, "Prijava nestanka putne isprave/putovnice (ukradena, izgubljena)" (Report of Loss of a Travel Document/Passport (stolen, lost)) — opens Bosnia and Herzegovina's Passport vertical (2 of 6), following ba/apif/business-entity-classification-application@1.0.0's opening of the Business Formation vertical. This report is filed with a domestic Republika Srpska police authority (a police station or other competent MUP RS body) to declare a travel document (most commonly an ordinary passport, putovnica) lost or stolen, which invalidates the document; MUP RS's own instructions state this form may be used to declare a travel document void. Republika Srpska is one of Bosnia and Herzegovina's two constituent entities (the other being the Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina, plus the Brčko District); this schema is scoped to Republika Srpska only, consistent with ba/apif/business-entity-classification-application@1.0.0. MUP RS's own Obrazac GPI-2 is the companion variant of this same report filed abroad with a Bosnia and Herzegovina diplomatic-consular mission (DKP) rather than a domestic police authority — disclosed here as open backlog for a future companion schema (see VERIFICATION.md), following this registry's established main-form-now/companion-form-later convention. This v1.0.0 models the applicant-facing fields only (the form's own closing section, filled in by the receiving police officer or competent authority, is authority-populated and out of scope). GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Bosnia and Herzegovina, the Government of Republika Srpska, or MUP RS.

authority.name: Министарство унутрашњих послова Републике Српске (Ministarstvo unutrašnjih poslova Republike Srpske, Ministry of Interior of Republika Srpska)

source.documentRef: Obrazac GPI-1 — "Prijava nestanka putne isprave/putovnice (ukradena, izgubljena)" (Report of Loss of a Travel Document/Passport (stolen, lost))

verification.notes: GOV-4720 ("GovSchema Standard Research"). Opens Bosnia and Herzegovina's Passport vertical (2 of 6). See this document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, extraction method, and every disclosed scoping/judgment call.

fields.name: reporterFullName
fields.label: Ime i prezime podnosioca prijave (Full name of the person filing the report)
fields.description: The person submitting this report — the travel document's holder, or another person filing on the holder's behalf (e.g. a parent reporting for a minor child).

fields.name: receivingAuthorityName
fields.label: Naziv organa kome se prijava podnosi (Name of the authority to which the report is submitted)
fields.description: The domestic Republika Srpska police station or other competent MUP RS authority the applicant is addressing this report to.

fields.name: documentStatus
fields.label: Putna isprava/putovnica je (The travel document/passport is)
fields.description: Whether the missing travel document was lost or stolen.
fields.sourceRef: Obrazac GPI-1 page 1, Section 4, checkbox pair

fields.name: holderPersonalId
fields.label: JMB (Holder's unique master citizen number)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The travel document holder's JMBG-style unique master citizen number.

fields.name: holderFirstName
fields.label: Ime (Holder's first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: holderLastName
fields.label: Prezime (Holder's last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: holderParentName
fields.label: Ime jednog roditelja (Name of one parent of the holder)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Used by MUP RS as an additional identifying particular of the holder.

fields.name: holderDateOfBirth
fields.label: Datum rođenja (Holder's date of birth)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: holderPlaceAndCountryOfBirth
fields.label: Mjesto i država rođenja (Holder's place and country of birth)
fields.description: The form prints place and country of birth as a single combined item with one answer line.

fields.name: holderPermanentAddress
fields.label: Adresa prebivališta nosioca (Holder's permanent-residence address)
fields.description: Street address of the holder's permanent residence (prebivalište).

fields.name: holderPermanentAddressPlace
fields.label: Mjesto prebivališta nosioca (Holder's permanent-residence place)
fields.description: Town/municipality of the holder's permanent residence.

fields.name: holderTemporaryAddress
fields.label: Adresa boravišta nosioca (Holder's temporary-residence address)
fields.description: Street address of the holder's temporary residence (boravište), if different from the permanent residence.

fields.name: holderTemporaryAddressPlace
fields.label: Mjesto boravišta nosioca (Holder's temporary-residence place)
fields.description: Town/municipality of the holder's temporary residence, if different from the permanent residence.

fields.name: issuingAuthority
fields.label: Organ koji je izdao nestalu putnu ispravu/putovnicu (Authority that issued the missing travel document)
fields.description: The authority that originally issued the now-missing travel document.

fields.name: dateOfLoss
fields.label: Datum nestanka putne isprave/putovnice (Date the travel document was lost or stolen)
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: placeOfLoss
fields.label: Mjesto nestanka putne isprave/putovnice (Place the travel document was lost or stolen)
fields.description: Where the loss or theft occurred.

fields.name: circumstancesDescription
fields.label: Opis okolnosti nestanka putne isprave/putovnice (Description of the circumstances of the loss or theft)
fields.description: Free-text account of how the travel document came to be lost or stolen. The form provides a large ruled area (continuing onto page 2) for this answer.

fields.name: filingPlace
fields.label: Mjesto podnošenja prijave (Place the report is filed)
fields.description: The town/municipality where the applicant is filing this report.

fields.name: filingDate
fields.label: Datum podnošenja prijave (Date the report is filed)
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: reporterIdCardNumber
fields.label: LK/OI broj (Reporting person's ID card number)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The identity-card number of the person filing this report (lična karta/osobna iskaznica).

fields.name: reporterIdCardIssuedBy
fields.label: LK/OI izdao (Authority that issued the reporting person's ID card)
fields.description: The authority that issued the identity card given in reporterIdCardNumber.

steps.title: Data on the travel document holder
Data on the missing travel document
